upgrade_source: Wikipedia (62nd Street/New Utrecht Avenue station); Brooklyn Reporter (July 2019); MTA press materials
notes: Part of the 62 St/New Utrecht Av station complex shared by Sea Beach (N) and West End (D) lines. Four ADA-accessible elevators installed, connecting N train platform up to D train platform. Elevators entered service July 19, 2019. The transfer between the two lines was closed during 2015-2019 construction. Station is in Borough Park/Bensonhurst.
